wg_add_world.description: Add world and assign a channel

options.kanal: Channel where this world's reports will be posted

options.lista: Player nicknames, separated by commas or new lines

wg_add_absent.description: Add single absence to a member

setup_reset.description: Unlock configuration so /setup can be run again (admin only).
